findings.finding: _phase_transition_abbrev label lookup at cortex_command/dashboard/data.py:584-590 has no entry for 'review→implement-rework'; display falls through to raw_label. Cosmetic only — not a regression — but means rework transitions show as 'review→implement-rework' instead of an abbreviated form. Adding a key is a one-line follow-up if the dashboard's transition labels start looking inconsistent.
findings.reviewer_angle: Vocabulary expansion silently breaks string-comparison consumers

findings.finding: Existing test fixtures at cortex_command/dashboard/tests/test_data.py:1150,1171,1212 hard-code phase_transitions with 'to: implement' for stall-detection scenarios. After Task 5 lands, additional test cases exercising 'to: implement-rework' transitions through parse_feature_events should be added — Task 5's verification (pytest cortex_command/dashboard/tests/ -x) will catch breakage in existing tests but does not enforce coverage of the new vocabulary in parse_feature_events.
findings.reviewer_angle: Vocabulary expansion silently breaks string-comparison consumers
findings.evidence_quote: Task 4 adds exactly one rework test for compute_slow_flags, but the rework-equivalent test fixtures for parse_feature_events (the function that produces rework_cycles and current_phase) are not added.
